text.message: I don’t really know what I did to make you take a worse spot so I couldn’t have it and then solo haha
i didnt take a worse spot
The solo seemed personal after you did it though
I don’t get what I was meant to take? I though I left you with 2 good options and though youd go double ore
Nothing was done with intent from my end to affect you
you went in the middle and killed both
Yeah so fair enough pick. More just the solo
Anyway I’ll move on. Sorry for whinging
I’m just trying to make clear I wasn’t trying to hurt your position just trying to better mine thinking I had a good 3 hex spot to go to
i mean there is no other steal right
im playing without grain and ore lol
i dont know why im the steal still
I wanted to trade with you?
you have to test blue's edv black
The guy building to 10 with no room? Lol
first you solo rob blue after plowing him in round 1
and then now you are robbing from the last place
i guess i wont play with you after a while
we cant get through to black
no way we are winning this oj
I would have traded you roads black
What a terrible way to ruin a game
